content.full_text:
November 10, 1990


McCandliss for Mayor
Coleen A. Scott
Treasurer
P.O. Box 1982
Chula Vista, CA 92012


California Fair Political Practices Commission
428 J Street, Suite 800
Sacramento, CA 95804-0807

Dear Sir or Madam:

     We would like advice on transferring contributions from one campaign account into another. Gayle McCandliss is a councilmember in the City of Chula Vista. She has one account, Friends of Gayle McCandliss. We opened up a second account, McCandliss for Mayor, this spring when she ran for Mayor of Chula Vista. We then transferred $4250 from the Friends of Gayle McCandliss account to the McCandliss for Mayor account. This leaves around $4700 in the Friends of Gayle McCandliss account. We would now like to close out this account and transfer all the money to the McCandliss for Mayor account.

     We are seeking formal written advice on the legality of the transfer.

     Thank you,

Coleen A. Scott
Treasurer
(619) 422-3773

[The image appears to be mostly blank/white with only very faint text visible at the top and bottom that is too illegible to accurately transcribe. The document appears to be heavily faded or poorly scanned.]

sections.question: We would like advice on transferring contributions from one campaign account into another. Gayle McCandliss is a councilmember in the City of Chula Vista. She has one account, Friends of Gayle McCandliss. We opened up a second account, McCandliss for Mayor, this spring when she ran for Mayor of Chula Vista. We then transferred $4250 from the Friends of Gayle McCandliss account to the McCandliss for Mayor account. This leaves around $4700 in the Friends of Gayle McCandliss account. We would now like to close out this account and transfer all the money to the McCandliss for Mayor account. We are seeking formal written advice on the legality of the transfer.
sections.question_synthetic: Is it legal to transfer remaining campaign funds ($4,700) from a closed candidate account (Friends of Gayle McCandliss) to an active mayoral campaign account (McCandliss for Mayor)?
sections.parsing_notes: No section headers found; LLM: This is an incoming request letter, not an FPPC response. No conclusion or advice section is present. The document contains only the inquiry from the campaign treasurer. Document date is November 10, 1990, and document ID is 90708.
